mapper.select:
SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.user_id AS userId, r.rating AS rating, r.view_cnt AS viewCnt, r.is_paid AS isPaid, r.content AS content, IFNULL(c.com_name, '일반 리뷰') AS comName, CASE WHEN r.stored_name IS NOT NULL OR (r.img_url IS NOT NULL AND r.img_url != '') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hasImg, DATE_FORMAT(r.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate FROM Review r LEFT OUTER JOIN Company c ON r.company_no = c.company_no WHERE r.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
AND r.is_paid = #{isPaid}
AND c.com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') AND r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (c.com_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR r.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
SELECT company_no AS companyNo, com_name AS comName, com_type AS comType, com_address AS comAddress FROM Company WHERE company_no = #{companyNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Review_Like WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Review ( user_id, company_no, content, rating, is_paid, receipt_name, stored_name, img_url, reg_date, approval_status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{companyNo}, #{content}, #{rating}, #{isPaid}, #{receiptName}, #{storedName}, #{imgUrl}, NOW(), 'PENDING' )
INSERT INTO Review_Like (review_no, user_id, reg_date) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Review_Like WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Review SET like_cnt = like_cnt + #{amount} WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo}
